method: multi-modal silver-gold: independent Claude reviewer per paper reads methods+tables+figure images, scores extraction precision (vs full source) + recall (items only in tables/figures). Silver, not human-gold.
note: Precision here (~full-source) is the honest extraction-accuracy number; it is LOWER than the value-in-quote auto-proxy because it catches wrong-quote / cross-protocol / cell-type errors. Recall is the dominant gap (timeline, media, supplement doses, table-only values).
